calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Mandatory Settlement Conference in Dept. 218.
Appearances: Wayne Goodroe, Esq. for Plaintiff; Dale Naymik defendant In Pro Per.
Matter assigned to Peter Hadiaris, Judge Pro Tem, for settlement conference. The parties reach settlement, which is read into record:
Defendant Dale Naymik is to remain in possession of the premises located at 190 O'Farrell Street, Room 311, San Francisco, California. Past rent for the period 4/22/04-present and future rent for period through 10/20/04 is forgiven by Plaintiff. Defendant to commence weekly rental payments on Thursday, 10/21/04 at the St. Moritz Hotel office. There is no grace period for the weekly rental payments, and in the event of any failure by defendant to make timely payment of weekly rental, Plaintiff is entitled to immediately obtain a judgment for possession upon ex parte application, with the Clerk to immediately issue a writ of possession on the judgment. Defendant waives all claims of breach of warranty of habitability and any other defenses.
The stipulation is to remain in effect for one year; if defendant timely performs all obligations under the stipulation through October 21, 2005, Plaintiff shall file a dismissal of the action within twenty days thereafter.
Both parties acknowledge on the record their understanding of and agreement to the terms of the settlement. The trial date is ordered vacated.
Judge Pro Tem: Peter Hadiaris; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Patty Lee Hubble (D. 218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dale Naymik, Defendant Propria Persona
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Defendant did not notify Plaintiff's counsel of his appearance today. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT DALE NAYMIK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- OVERRULED WITH FIVE(5) DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER from notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/JL) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
